text:
おかえり。
見事な成果だったねえ。

いとも簡単にやってのけるとは
お兄さんも驚きだよ。

この程度の難易度じゃ
きみには物足りないのかもね。

何にせよお疲れ様。
また挑戦したくなったら

Welcome back, pardner. That was a heck of a
show.

You sure make this stuff look easy. Gives this
fella a shock from time to time.

I guess this difficulty level's just beneath
you, huh pardner?

In any case, fine work. Give a holler if you
feel like giving it another ride.
